summary: Replaced the blocking MainWindow_Loaded startup sequence with a two-phase approach: (1) LoadChatsFromConfig immediately populates the ListView from saved config with no network call, then (2) RefreshChatsFromTelegramAsync fetches live data in the background after WaitForLoginAsync completes and merges settings back in. The old InitAsync and LoadDataAsync methods were removed and replaced by these two new methods. Fixed model mismatches: used Download (not DownloadTypes) and removed non-existent DownloadAfterDate. Build succeeded with 0 errors.
current_status: Startup UX improved — chats show instantly from config on startup; Telegram refresh happens silently in background. Build green.
